summary: Completed frontend testing for TickBoom iteration 2 features. 9/10 test cases passed. The 'Before & After' section renders correctly with all 4 transformation cards. About/Blog pages have unique SEO titles. 'What is Strict Mode?' FAQ entry is visible. All main sections render with semantic <main> tag. ISSUE: JSON-LD structured data scripts (app, org, FAQ schemas) are NOT being injected into DOM by react-helmet - this is a known limitation.

seo_issues.issue: JSON-LD structured data scripts not rendering - react-helmet v6.1.0 has known issues with script tags. Need to migrate to react-helmet-async

action_items: Migrate from react-helmet (v6.1.0) to react-helmet-async for proper JSON-LD script tag rendering
Wrap app root with HelmetProvider after migration
Verify JSON-LD scripts render in DOM after migration using Google Rich Results Test
critical_code_review_comments: SEO.jsx: JSON-LD schemas are correctly structured but react-helmet doesn't properly inject script tags with type='application/ld+json' into the DOM - this is a known library limitation, not a code issue
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 2 verified new features: 1) Before & After section with 4 transformation cards (data-testid='before-after-section', 'transformation-card-0' to 'transformation-card-3'), 2) Unique SEO titles for About/Blog pages, 3) 'What is Strict Mode?' FAQ entry added, 4) Semantic <main> tag added. KNOWN ISSUE: JSON-LD scripts not rendering due to react-helmet limitation - main agent should migrate to react-helmet-async. All other SEO meta tags (description, keywords, canonical, OG, Twitter) ARE rendering correctly via Helmet.
